2606.06088.title: CHALIS: A Challenge Dataset for Language Identification in Difficult Scenarios
2606.06088.paper_summary: We present CHALIS (Challenging Language Identification Samples), a new benchmark dataset explicitly designed to address difficult cases in language identification: cousin languages and orthographic noise. Our dataset has two parts: First, we collected sentences shared across mutually intelligible language pairs (Czech/Slovak, Spanish/Catalan, Portuguese/Galician, Danish/Norwegian). The second part tests for orthography noise: we transliterate text across multiple scripts, remove diacritics, simulate homoglyph attacks, and use Internet slang. We evaluate four widely used language identification systems on CHALIS and demonstrate that all struggle substantially in these scenarios, especially on lower-resource languages within cousin pairs and on transliterated input. The resource is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/michal-tichy/CHALIS.
2606.06088.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 CHALIS（挑戰性語言識別樣本），這是一個新基準數據集，專門設計用來解決語言識別中的困難案例：親屬語言和正字法噪音。<lb/>我們的數據集分為兩部分：首先，我們收集了在相互可理解的語言對（捷克語/斯洛伐克語、西班牙語/加泰羅尼亞語、葡萄牙語/加利西亞語、丹麥語/挪威語）之間共享的句子。<lb/>第二部分測試正字法噪音：我們在多種文字之間音譯文本，去除變音符號，模擬同形攻擊，並使用網絡俚語。<lb/>我們在 CHALIS 上評估了四個廣泛使用的語言識別系統，並證明所有系統在這些情境中都面臨重大挑戰，特別是在親屬語言對中的低資源語言和音譯輸入上。<lb/>該資源可在 https://huggingface.co/datasets/michal-tichy/CHALIS 上公開獲取。
2606.06088.author: Michal Tichý et.al.
